codeReview.summary: The rerun fix directly addresses the prior blocking gap: startup fetch now uses an emitted-log path and asserts non-empty captured production log output before secret-safety checks, so VAL-CROSS-006 evidence can no longer pass on helper-only aggregation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked `followedProcedure=true`, but the handoff verification evidence still omits explicit context-read commands required by the skill's handoff discipline.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/switcher-integration-worker/SKILL.md requires context-read evidence in `verification.commandsRun` before setting `followedProcedure=true`; handoff 2026-04-10T06-04-17-038Z__integration-hardening-enforce-emitted-log-evidence-in-startup-fetch-test__79a48c3d-4130-44a5-b971-9a9f23fea6bf.json lists only test execution commands.

summary: Reviewed fix commit fc83e287 against prior failing review for integration-hardening-production-log-sink-redaction-proof. The new `fetchAllProfilesWithLogging()` emission path plus non-empty emitted-log assertion in `test_startupProfileFetch_capturesRuntimeLogs_noSecrets` closes the original failure mode, so this fix passes.
